content.text: {"title":"Client lists available reports","slug":"client-lists-available-reports","intent":"An API client needs to discover report data available for review.","story":"The client requests the reports endpoint.","expected_behavior":"The API returns a list of reports.","boundaries":"This story does not cover report generation.","auditable_claims":["The reports route is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: GET /api/reports"],"docs":[]}}
